info.name: multitenancy001-e2e (v29 SUBSCRIPTION + BILLING BINDING SUITE)
info.description: V29 - suíte completa de subscription / plan change / billing binding no padrão da v28. Estrutura inteira em uma única pasta teste_v29.

exec: let json={}; try{json=pm.response.json();}catch(e){} if(json.accountId){pm.environment.set("tenant_account_id", json.accountId); pm.environment.set("account_id", json.accountId);}

let json=pm.response.json(); if(json.accessToken) pm.environment.set("tenant_access_token", json.accessToken); if(json.refreshToken) pm.environment.set("tenant_refresh_token", json.refreshToken); if(json.accountId) {pm.environment.set("tenant_account_id", json.accountId); pm.environment.set("account_id", json.accountId);} if(json.tenantSchema) pm.environment.set("tenant_schema", json.tenantSchema); if(json.userId) pm.environment.set("tenant_user_id", json.userId);
let json=pm.response.json(); if(json.currentPlan) pm.environment.set("subscription_current_plan", json.currentPlan); if(json.accountId) pm.environment.set("tenant_account_id", json.accountId);

let json={}; try{json=pm.response.json();}catch(e){} if(json.paymentId) pm.environment.set("upgrade_payment_id", json.paymentId); if(json.newPlan) pm.environment.set("subscription_current_plan", json.newPlan);
